summary: The diff implements a complete transformation from a family messaging app to an e-commerce platform for Bhai Bhai Fertilizer. All core e-commerce functionality is present including product catalog, shopping cart, checkout, and user profiles with Internet Identity authentication. The UI features an agricultural theme with greens and earth tones. However, some acceptance criteria around quantity adjustment and order history viewing appear to be missing or incomplete in the truncated diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Customers can adjust product quantities in cart
missing_requirements.reason: ShoppingCart.tsx is truncated and does not show quantity adjustment controls (Plus/Minus buttons imported but implementation cut off)

missing_requirements.requirement: Authenticated customers can view their past orders
missing_requirements.reason: No evidence of order history retrieval or display functionality in UserProfile.tsx or any query hooks. Orders are stored in backend but no frontend interface to view past orders is shown
